description: Aggregate non-performing loan (NPL) ratio across IDC direct lending portfolio stands at 18.5%, significantly above the 10% internal threshold. Five portfolio companies with combined exposure of ZMW 420,000,000 are in technical default.
mitigationPlan: Engage distressed portfolio companies with restructuring plans; increase loan loss provisioning to 25% of NPL exposure; consider debt-equity swaps for strategically important entities.

description: Delays in implementing the SOE privatisation programme per MoF-DIR-2024-005 are reducing IDC portfolio returns and increasing GRZ fiscal burden. Political economy constraints and lack of strategic investors are the primary blockers.
mitigationPlan: Re-engage Ministry of Finance and Cabinet on privatisation timeline; develop alternative structures where full divestiture is not feasible; improve SOE performance to attract investors.

description: Prolonged drought conditions have reduced Kariba Dam water levels to critically low levels, threatening capacity of the 1,080 MW Kafue Gorge and 600 MW Kariba North hydropower stations which provide over 85% of national generation capacity.
mitigationPlan: Accelerate solar IPP procurement; negotiate emergency power imports from Mozambique (HCB) and Eskom; implement structured load management programme.

description: ZESCO tariff levels remain significantly below cost-reflective levels, creating a structural revenue deficit of approximately ZMW 780,000,000 per annum. This threatens ZESCO's ability to service debt and pay dividends to IDC.
mitigationPlan: Progress ERB tariff review application; engage Ministry of Energy for policy support; implement cost reduction measures pending tariff approval.

description: ZCCM-IH primary income is dividends from copper and cobalt mining portfolio companies. LME copper price volatility directly impacts dividend income and NAV per share, reducing IDC's consolidated dividend receipts.
mitigationPlan: Maintain diversified portfolio across copper, cobalt, and emerald commodities; implement hedging strategy review annually; maintain minimum ZMW 600M liquidity reserve.

description: Mainline track condition on the Livingstone-Kitwe corridor is severely deteriorated with approximately 340 km (32%) of track classified as Category 3 or 4, requiring speed restrictions or complete suspension. IDC is exposed to reputational and fiscal risk.
mitigationPlan: Implement 3-year track rehabilitation plan with minimum ZMW 1,200,000,000 capital investment; accelerate Phase 1 (Livingstone-Mazabuka) rehabilitation using GRZ capital injection.

description: ZANACO non-performing loan (NPL) ratio rose to 11.2% in Q3 2024, exceeding the BoZ regulatory threshold of 10%. IDC's 45% equity stake means any regulatory action against ZANACO directly impacts IDC's balance sheet.
mitigationPlan: Strengthen credit underwriting standards; intensify collection efforts; increase IFRS 9 Stage 2 provisioning; submit NPL reduction plan to BoZ.

description: Artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) gold supply chain faces risks of smuggling and under-declaration of gold volumes, reducing Zambia Gold's procurement volumes and government royalty revenues.
mitigationPlan: Expand gold buying centre network; implement digital gold tracking system; engage Zambia Police and ZRA on anti-smuggling enforcement.
